title: doc-amender-prompt.md runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for doc-amender-prompt.md files — operator-authored prompt assets consumed by the doc-amender skill (T-28) when round-tripping LLM-guided amendments through staging-emit per L-106. Prompts ship outside-vault as state-tier assets under $VAULT_WRITER_STATE_ROOT/prompts/*.md (per writer-pipeline-layering.md L-108 and foundation-governance-target-state.md §A62). Declares the foundation-shipped variable namespace the prompt body may reference; declares the 3-signal survivorship policy (operator-edit-wins + amender-conflict-sidecar + amender-paused-frontmatter) that extends the existing 2-signal operator-edit-wins detection per L-107. Companion contract to skills/doc-amender (T-28). Authored under SP14 Batch D T-29 (2026-05-19).

_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep with doc-amender skill + writer-fan-in doc-deps entries

signals.name: operator-edit-wins
signals.trigger: Existing operator-edit-wins two-signal detection (last_user_edit timestamp + content-diff against writer's last-known-hash)
signals.action: Amender SKIPS LLM call; emits _amender-conflict.json sidecar

signals.name: amender-conflict-sidecar
signals.action: Sidecar file at <destination>.amender-conflict.json; operator triages via /amend-accept <sidecar> skill

signals.name: amender-paused-frontmatter
signals.trigger: Destination file frontmatter declares amender_paused: true
signals.action: Amender permanently skips this destination until operator removes the flag

survivorship_policy_detail.boundary: doc-amender NEVER writes destination directly; round-trips through staging via staging-emit per L-106
